title: Bitter Gooey Lazy-Sunday Cake
description: This low-carb-friendly dessert features a blend of bitter flavors and is best enjoyed on a lazy Sunday with family.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a loaf pan.
In a mixing bowl, combine custard powder and cocoa powder. Add almond flour, vanilla extract, and beaten egg yolks. Stir until well combined.
Add coconut oil and unsweetened almond milk. Mix until smooth and no lumps remain.
Pour mixture into the prepared loaf pan. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
While cake bakes, whip heavy cream to stiff peaks.
Once baked, let cool slightly before slicing and serving. Optionally sprinkle with bitter chocolate shavings.
Serve warm with your favorite ice cream for an extra indulgence.
